acceptance_tests.cross_channel: Magnetic precursor timing is corroborated by at least one independent edge channel.
acceptance_tests.falsification: No robust precursor, insufficient lead time, or inconsistent timing across channels falsifies the diagnostic-trigger claim for this event.
acceptance_tests.lead_time: Trigger lead exceeds measured processing plus candidate actuator latency.
acceptance_tests.precursor_exists: A reproducible pre-event growth signal exceeds its noise-derived threshold before the event marker.

requested_observables.candidate_source: IMAS ece.channel.t_e.data or mapped ECE channels
appropriate Mirnov/magnetic probe channels selected by DIII-D reviewer
PTDATA dssdenest and/or available interferometer/profile channel
D-alpha/divertor light or established ELM/event marker
PCS/RMP/coil command and measured response channels applicable to shot
FDP efit01 tree around requested window
